rationale: The Clotho Task 4a implementation faithfully satisfies the frozen v15 scope, strictly adhering to the AM-40 (closed PACKAGE_ROOTS), AM-41 (enforced source profile), and D33 (shared literal module-load closure) rulings. The closed inventory module commits the exact expected package and documentation lists, the exact D31 contract files and ledger sources, and the D32 builtin safe-exports map with rigorous deep-freeze and equality tests. The shared `util.mjs` successfully implements the D33 literal classifier and resolver (leveraged properly by both closure derivation and application code-weaver logic), correctly restricting accepted grammar through the fail-closed source profile scanner without overstepping into full ECMAScript parsing. The `git` and `code` weavers correctly consume the D26 counted sources with proper edge matrix mappings, determinism, and accurate fallback behavior for unseeded nodes and unrepresentable consumers. Zero runtime dependencies are used, and tests verify closure matching and git boundaries securely.
